title: C360TotalReopenIssues
description: KPI payload for Total Reopen Issues widget — single pre-computed section for AI narrator (1 bullet output). No drill-down. Backend provides totalCompliances, openIssues, reopenedIssues; closedIssues and reopenedPercent are pre-computed.

reopenIssuesSummary.description: Single KPI section: reopened issues volume and quality signal as percentage of closed issues

totalCompliances.description: Total count of distinct compliance records in the selected period (from backend)

openIssues.description: Count of issues currently open (from backend)

closedIssues.description: Pre-computed: totalCompliances - openIssues - reopenedIssues. Issues in Closed/Resolved/Accepted status that have NOT been reopened.

reopenedIssues.description: Count of issues that were previously closed/resolved but have been reopened (from backend)

reopenedPercent.description: Pre-computed: (reopenedIssues / (closedIssues + reopenedIssues)) × 100, rounded to 1 decimal. Denominator = all issues that have gone through a closure event. Empty string when (closedIssues + reopenedIssues) = 0.
